values.name: message
values.value: No pending keywords in queue. Run keyword discovery first.

options.systemMessage: You are an expert SEO content writer and Next.js developer specializing in local service businesses. You write engaging, informative blog posts that rank well for local search terms. You ALWAYS follow the exact TSX format provided, returning ONLY the raw file content with NO markdown fences. CRITICAL RULES: (1) Only export two things: 'export const metadata' and 'export default function BlogPost'. NEVER add export const postData, export const config, export const revalidate, or any other exports — they will break the Next.js build. (2) Write all content as real JSX elements, NEVER use dangerouslySetInnerHTML with HTML strings. (3) Never use markdown link syntax [text](url) — use proper JSX Link or anchor elements. You are meticulous about JSX syntax: apostrophes become ', ampersands become &.

parameters.name: tavily_search
parameters.description: Search the web to research a topic. Use to understand what people want when searching a keyword, find competitor content, and get local Mississippi context.

values.name: message
values.value: Agent did not return valid TSX content
